title: Nautilus Shell Block
description: With this mod you can place the shell of the nautilus or the nautilus armors on the ground.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hVVOFuln/images/89aa97f5bcdb6f263bc51ec49762ea56f912363c.gif)

With this mod you can place the shell of the nautilus on the ground.
All you need is the nautilus shell item and click with it on the ground.
You can place it down in the direction you are looking.


After a while when waterlogged or when its raining it can change its texture into the zombie nautilus one and later into the coral zombie one.

You can manually change its texture too!


To clean it, you can break it and then it will drop a normal nautilus shell item, making it have the default texture when placing it again.
When its in default state, then using a slime ball on it has a chance to make it have the zombie texture.
When its on default or zombie state, then using a coral on it has a chance to make it have the coral texture.
There is an item json tag in the data folder for these, so you can change the required items for them.



You can also place the nautilus armor blocks down on the ground!



From version below 1.21.11, you can craft the nautilus armor blocks with a nautilus shell and an ingot from the armor type.
When breaking it, it will drop the nautilus shell and the ingot too (in 1.21.11+ it will drop the armor instead of the ingot)!



Mod currently supports

**Forge 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6| 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**
